title: Research
text: My research focuses on how catchments respond to hydroclimatic extremes, and why apparently similar places can behave differently under similar conditions.

title: CV
text:
I am currently a postdoctoral researcher at the WSL Institute for Snow and Avalanche Research and ETH Zurich
You can download my current CV here:
Download CV

title: Bailey J. Anderson
text:
Hydrologist
I seek to understand why apparently similar catchments respond differently to similar forcings, and how those responses emerge from interacting hydrological processes across space and time.
Research Download CV

title: Bailey J. Anderson
text:
Research Themes








Hydrological response
Why do apparently similar catchments respond differently?









Variability and Whiplash
Understanding rapid state changes in streamflow.









Methodology
Challenging how methodological choices influence scientific conclusions.
